headline: Fox Corporation (FOX) to Acquire Roku (ROKU) for $22B in Cash-and-Stock Deal
summary: ​Fox Corporation (NASDAQ:FOX) is one of the undervalued stocks with high upside potential. On June 15, Fox Corporation announced a definitive agreement to acquire Roku (NASDAQ:ROKU) in a cash-and-stock transaction valued at approximately $22 billion. The deal values Roku at $160 per share, uniting Fox’s portfolio of live sports, news, and the Tubi streaming service […]

headline: Fox Outbid Netflix to Buy Roku, So Why Are Both Stocks Falling?
summary: Fox's $22 billion acquisition of Roku could reshape streaming distribution, but investors are questioning whether the debt-fueled price tag is worth the risk.
